away.starter_source: live ESPN roster/stat/injury APIs; starters inferred by live minutes + production

players.name: Sonia Citron
players.injury_comment: Citron is in danger of missing back-to-back contests with a left foot sprain Saturday. Cotie McMahon, who logged a season-high four assists and three steals in Tuesday's win over the Sky, would appear to be the primary fantasy beneficiary if Citron is unable to play.

players.name: Lauren Betts
players.injury_comment: The Mystics figure to check back in with Betts closer to Saturday's tipoff to see how she's feeling. Angela Dugalic would likely pick up more playing time at center if Betts is unable to play.

home.starter_source: live ESPN roster/stat/injury APIs; starters inferred by live minutes + production

players.name: Brionna Jones
players.injury_comment: Jones was spotted getting some shots up after Thursday's morning shootaround. She's reportedly making good progress, but a timetable has yet to be established. The Dream are planning to be "very smart" with her return, Copeland adds.
